message:
feat(kernel-cpu,dispatch): add contiguous f64 elementwise tensor ops and enrich KernelError taxonomy

Introduce add/sub/mul/div_tensor_contiguous_f64 kernels that operate on
raw f64 storage buffers with TensorMeta validation (shape, contiguity,
storage offset, and buffer length checks). A shared
elementwise_contiguous_f64 helper centralises the validation-then-zip
pattern.

KernelError gains four new variants — ShapeMismatch, UnsupportedLayout,
StorageSpanOverflow, and InsufficientStorage — each carrying enough
context for actionable diagnostics. DispatchError and KernelError drop
the Copy derive since the new variants contain Vec/String fields.

Comprehensive tests cover the happy paths, offset-aware windowing,
shape-mismatch rejection, non-contiguous rejection, and insufficient-
storage detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
